items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Launches Health in ChatGPT for Personalized Insights
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Health：串接健康紀錄提供個人化洞察
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI announced Health in ChatGPT is rolling out to U.S. users. Eligible users can securely connect Apple Health and supported medical records so ChatGPT can provide contextual insights, track changes, and support more informed conversations, powered by models including GPT-5.6 Sol for paid users. Data is not used for training or ads.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 ChatGPT Health 開始向美國用戶推出。用戶可安全串接 Apple Health 與支援的醫療紀錄，讓 ChatGPT 提供情境化洞察、追蹤變化並支援更有根據的對話；付費用戶使用 GPT-5.6 Sol。資料不用於訓練或廣告。
items_flat.analysis_en: This moves ChatGPT deeper into personal health management, potentially changing how users interact with medical data daily. Key uncertainty remains long-term privacy trust and regulatory scrutiny around AI health advice.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這讓 ChatGPT 更深介入個人健康管理，可能改變日常與醫療資料的互動方式。關鍵不確定性在於長期隱私信任與 AI 健康建議的監管檢視。
items_flat.quote: Health in ChatGPT is starting to roll out to U.S. users. You can securely connect Apple Health and supported medical records to understand your information in context, track what has changed, and have more informed conversations.
items_flat.quote_zh: ChatGPT Health 開始向美國用戶推出。您可以安全連接 Apple Health 與支援的醫療紀錄，以便在情境中理解資訊、追蹤變化，並進行更有根據的對話。

items_flat.title_en: ChatGPT Voice Arrives on Desktop with GPT-Live Multi-Agent Control
items_flat.title_zh: ChatGPT Voice 登陸桌面版：GPT-Live 支援語音操控多代理
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out ChatGPT Voice to the desktop app on macOS and Windows. Powered by GPT-Live, users can control their computer and direct multiple agents in ChatGPT Work or Codex using only voice, speaking, listening and coordinating simultaneously. Available to Plus, Pro, Business, Edu and Enterprise plans.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Voice 推至 macOS 與 Windows 桌面應用。由 GPT-Live 驅動，用戶可純語音操控電腦並指揮 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 中的多個代理，同時說話、聆聽與協調工作。向 Plus、Pro、Business、Edu 與 Enterprise 方案推出。
items_flat.analysis_en: Desktop voice with real computer control and multi-agent orchestration marks a practical leap toward hands-free agentic workflows. Adoption and reliability outside controlled demos will determine impact.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 桌面語音搭配真實電腦控制與多代理編排，是邁向免手動 agent 工作流的實用躍進。實際採用率與示範外穩定性將決定影響力。
items_flat.quote: ChatGPT Voice is now in the desktop app. Control your computer and direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex, using just your voice. It's powered by GPT-Live, so it can speak, listen, and coordinate work in the app at the same time.
items_flat.quote_zh: ChatGPT Voice 現已登陸桌面應用。只需語音即可控制電腦並指揮 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 中的多個代理。由 GPT-Live 驅動，可同時說話、聆聽並協調應用內工作。

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Upgrades Claude Voice Mode with Opus/Sonnet and Tool Use
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 升級 Claude 語音模式：支援 Opus/Sonnet 與中途工具呼叫
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic updated Claude Voice Mode so it now runs on Claude Opus, Sonnet and Haiku, can reach connected tools like Gmail and Slack mid-conversation, and supports more languages. Available in beta to all users on mobile, desktop and web; free plan limited to Haiku and one tool.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 更新 Claude 語音模式，現可運行於 Claude Opus、Sonnet 與 Haiku，中途可呼叫已連接工具（如 Gmail、Slack），並支援更多語言。公開 beta 向所有用戶開放於手機、桌面與網頁；免費方案限 Haiku 與一項工具。
items_flat.analysis_en: Bringing frontier models into voice with live tool use makes spoken problem-solving far more capable, closing the gap between casual chat and productive work. Success hinges on latency and reliable tool permission flows.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 將前沿模型帶入語音並支援即時工具，大幅提升口語解題能力，拉近閒聊與生產力工作的距離。成敗關鍵在延遲與工具權限流程的可靠度。
items_flat.quote: Voice mode now runs on Claude's more capable models and reaches the tools you've connected mid-conversation. Talk through the hard problems out loud, in many more languages.
items_flat.quote_zh: 語音模式現在運行於 Claude 更強大的模型，並可在對話中途使用已連接的工具。用更多語言大聲思考難題。

items_flat.title_en: xAI Introduces Workflows in Grok Build for Parallel Agent Orchestration
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok Build Workflows：支援上百平行代理編排
items_flat.summary_en: xAI announced Workflows in Grok Build. Users describe a complex task in plain language; Grok plans it, fans it out across up to 1,024 parallel agents in the background, verifies results, and returns a single report. Workflows can be saved as reusable slash commands.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 宣布 Grok Build 新增 Workflows。用戶用自然语言描述複雜任務，Grok 會規劃並分發給最多 1,024 個平行代理在背景執行、驗證結果後回報單一報告。工作流可儲存為可重複使用的斜線指令。
items_flat.analysis_en: Parallel multi-agent orchestration at this scale advances practical agentic coding and research tools beyond single-thread chat. Real-world reliability and cost of large agent budgets remain open questions.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這種規模的平行多代理編排，把實用 agent 編碼與研究工具推進到單線聊天之外。大規模代理預算的實際可靠性與成本仍是開放問題。
items_flat.quote: Grok Build can now write and run workflows: orchestration scripts that fan a task out across hundreds of parallel agents, verify the results, and report back in one background run.
items_flat.quote_zh: Grok Build 現在可以編寫並執行工作流：編排腳本將任務分發給數百個平行代理、驗證結果，並在一次背景運行中回報。

items_flat.title_en: Google Releases First ATLAS Report on Real-World AI Usage
items_flat.title_zh: Google 發布首份 ATLAS 報告：揭露真實世界 AI 使用樣貌
items_flat.summary_en: Google published the first AI & Economy ATLAS report, analyzing 15 million de-identified interactions from Gemini products used by over 1 billion people monthly. Findings show AI use is broad across occupations but shallow (mostly assistance, not full automation) and heavy outside work.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google 發布首份 AI & Economy ATLAS 報告，分析來自 Gemini 產品、超過 10 億月活用戶的 1,500 萬筆去識別互動。發現 AI 使用橫跨多數職業但深度有限（多為協助而非全面自動化），且工作外使用比例很高。
items_flat.analysis_en: Large-scale empirical data on actual AI adoption provides a needed baseline beyond hype or surveys. It underscores that transformative automation is still limited, informing policy and product priorities.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 大規模真實採用數據提供超越炒作與問卷的基線。它顯示轉型性自動化仍有限，有助政策與產品優先順序。
items_flat.quote: ATLAS sheds light on how people are using Google’s AI tools for various tasks at work and in their day-to-day lives.
items_flat.quote_zh: ATLAS 揭示人們如何在工作與日常生活中使用 Google 的 AI 工具執行各種任務。

google.title_en: Google Releases First ATLAS Report on Real-World AI Usage
google.title_zh: Google 發布首份 ATLAS 報告：揭露真實世界 AI 使用樣貌
google.summary_en: Google published the first AI & Economy ATLAS report, analyzing 15 million de-identified interactions from Gemini products used by over 1 billion people monthly. Findings show AI use is broad across occupations but shallow (mostly assistance, not full automation) and heavy outside work.
google.summary_zh: Google 發布首份 AI & Economy ATLAS 報告，分析來自 Gemini 產品、超過 10 億月活用戶的 1,500 萬筆去識別互動。發現 AI 使用橫跨多數職業但深度有限（多為協助而非全面自動化），且工作外使用比例很高。
google.analysis_en: Large-scale empirical data on actual AI adoption provides a needed baseline beyond hype or surveys. It underscores that transformative automation is still limited, informing policy and product priorities.
google.analysis_zh: 大規模真實採用數據提供超越炒作與問卷的基線。它顯示轉型性自動化仍有限，有助政策與產品優先順序。

google.quote_zh: ATLAS 揭示人們如何在工作與日常生活中使用 Google 的 AI 工具執行各種任務。

xai.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok Build Workflows：支援上百平行代理編排
xai.summary_en: xAI announced Workflows in Grok Build. Users describe a complex task in plain language; Grok plans it, fans it out across up to 1,024 parallel agents in the background, verifies results, and returns a single report. Workflows can be saved as reusable slash commands.

xai.analysis_zh: 這種規模的平行多代理編排，把實用 agent 編碼與研究工具推進到單線聊天之外。大規模代理預算的實際可靠性與成本仍是開放問題。

brief_en: OpenAI launched Health in ChatGPT for U.S. users and desktop Voice with GPT-Live multi-agent control. Anthropic upgraded Claude Voice Mode to Opus/Sonnet with mid-conversation tools. xAI added parallel-agent Workflows to Grok Build. Google released its first ATLAS study on real Gemini usage patterns.
brief_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT健康整合與桌面語音多代理控制；Anthropic升級Claude語音模式支援Opus/Sonnet與工具；xAI為Grok Build加入平行代理工作流；Google發布首份ATLAS真實AI使用研究。
